title: How Anthropic Engineers ACTUALLY Prompt Claude Code
summary: Austin Marchese outlines four rules for effectively prompting Claude Code based on studying how Anthropic engineers actually use the tool. The rules emphasize prompting for skills rather than direct tasks, building composable and reusable skills, maintaining control over invocation patterns, and allowing skills to improve iteratively across sessions.
